devices.name: Push 2
devices.notes: Composite MIDI + bulk display. MIDI for pad control, bulk OUT for sideband display.

devices.name: Aura Addressable (Gen 1)
devices.notes: Up to 120 LEDs per ARGB channel

devices.name: Aura GPU (SMBus)
devices.notes: Ampere/Lovelace GPUs via ENE SMBus. Hypercolor has SMBus transport support.

devices.name: iCUE LINK System Hub
devices.notes: Hub-and-spoke daisy-chain protocol, dynamic device enumeration

devices.name: XC7 RGB Elite LCD
devices.notes: 480x480 display + 31-LED ring, custom XC7 init sequence

devices.name: Defy (Wired)
devices.notes: Driver implemented but not functional. Needs firmware-side work to support external RGB control. Focus protocol works for config but lighting requires additional capability in Defy firmware.

devices.name: Defy (Wireless)
devices.notes: Same firmware limitation as wired variant. RGBW color support ready on our side.

devices.name: Gigabyte GPU (Gen 1-4)
devices.notes: 4 GPU generations. SMBus protocol, NVIDIA bus scanning.

devices.name: RGB Fusion Motherboard Controller
devices.notes: VID 0x048D, zone addresses 0x20-0x27, ARGB at 0x58-0x59, 240 LED max

vendors.name: HyperX
vendors.notes: Two VID eras: 0x0951 (Kingston) and 0x03F0 (HP/HyperX). Large peripheral portfolio.

devices.name: TL Fan Hub
devices.notes: VID 0x0416, Nuvoton-based. 26 LEDs/fan, 10 fans/port, 4 ports. RPM reading supported.

devices.name: Uni Hub - AL
devices.notes: Dual-ring fans (inner/outer), firmware-dependent: HID for v1.7+, Vendor for v1.0 (AL10)

devices.name: Galahad II LCD
devices.notes: VID 0x0416, 480x480 JPEG streaming via 1024-byte packets with sequence numbering

devices.name: Strimer Controller
devices.notes: 24-pin ATX: 120 LEDs, Dual 8-pin GPU: 108, Triple 8-pin: 162. Zone addresses 0x30-0x3B. BGR byte order.

vendors.name: Logitech
vendors.notes: Modern and legacy 8080 protocols. Wireless dongle support. Large peripheral portfolio.

devices.name: Logitech Modern Device (multi-PID)
devices.notes: Dynamic PID library. Covers G Pro, G915, G815, etc.

devices.name: MSI GPU (Lovelace)
devices.notes: SMBus protocol, base address from device list lookup

devices.name: Mystic Light Controller (185 Byte)
devices.notes: 185-byte HID, ARGB headers at 0x400-0x402. 120+ PIDs across many board revisions.

devices.name: Nanoleaf Panels (any)
devices.notes: mDNS discovery + power button pairing. Supports all panel shapes and light strips.

devices.name: Hue Bridge (any)
devices.notes: mDNS discovery + link button pairing. Controls all lights connected to bridge.

devices.name: Prism 8
devices.notes: VID 0x16D5, 8 channels x 126 LEDs, GRB byte order

devices.name: Prism Mini
devices.notes: VID 0x16D0, 128 LEDs max, color pair compression

devices.name: Prism S
devices.notes: VID 0x16D0, RGB byte order, ATX + GPU cable variants

devices.name: Lian Li O11 Dynamic - Razer Edition

vendors.name: SteelSeries
vendors.notes: GameSense-era protocol. Large peripheral portfolio with 40+ devices.

vendors.name: Thermaltake
vendors.notes: Large lighting controller portfolio with Riing fans

devices.name: WLED Controller (any)
devices.notes: DDP and E1.31 protocols. mDNS discovery. No auth required. ESP8266/ESP32 controllers.
